title: ruta chalepensis subsp. bracteosa
intro: Ruta chalepensis subsp. bracteosa, also known as the 'Wild Rue', is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of limonene and other essential oils. The health benefits of Ruta chalepensis subsp. bracteosa include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
